Name: IvyWise
Tagline: Prepare to find your best-fit college and get into your dream school with IvyWise, the #1 global college counseling and admissions consultancy.
About: Admissions is about more than just grades and test scores. Schools take a holistic approach to evaluating applications, considering activities, interests, and other factors outside of numbers, and IvyWise takes that same holistic approach when guiding students.
Philosophy: IvyWise counselors were in the rooms where the decisions were made, so they know how students will be evaluated in the highly-selective admissions process: they know every type of school system and curriculum, how to best advise students, how applications will be read, what admissions committees are looking for, and what it takes to stand out.
Outcomes: Are you considering applying to Dartmouth College? Whether you are beginning the college search process or finalizing your list, this is a great opportunity to learn all about Dartmouth and hear expert tips on how to get in from IvyWise college admissions counselors Alecia (formerly at Duke University) and Rachel (formerly at Swarthmore College).
Admissions: The IvyWise Initial Consultation is a detailed service, where your IvyWise counselor will provide a strategic action plan to help you achieve your educational goals — whether you’re figuring out your college plans, trying to make the most of your undergraduate experience, applying to graduate school, or interested in a WiseStart™ program. Contact us to schedule a complimentary Discovery Call with one of our expert enrollment advisors so we can learn a little more about you and your educational and/or admission goals.
Quote: Unlock your potential by embracing every dimension of your journey, for true success transcends numbers.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: IvyWise counselors hold degrees from prestigious institutions such as Harvard and Stanford, and have firsthand experience in admissions committees at top universities, ensuring expert guidance tailored to each student's needs.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: IvyWise offers personalized counseling sessions focusing on stress management and emotional resilience, fostering a supportive environment that prioritizes student mental health alongside academic goals.
Performance.Academic Integration: IvyWise integrates a comprehensive curriculum that includes guidance on AP and IB course selection, ensuring students are academically prepared for the rigorous demands of Ivy League admissions.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: IvyWise boasts a 92% acceptance rate to top-tier universities, with alumni attending institutions like Yale and Princeton, reflecting the consultancy's effective preparation and strategic application support.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Located in New York City, IvyWise provides access to state-of-the-art digital resources and a comprehensive library, supporting students with the latest tools for research and application preparation.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: IvyWise maintains student progress through regular trimester reports and parent conferences, ensuring alignment with NYSAIS standards and continuous improvement in the admissions process.
